text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been several days since the tryouts took place, but I can't get
Tamamo Cross's words out of my head.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're a rookie trainer, aren't ya? What makes ya think a no-name
trainer like you has what it takes?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya really think ya can take me on, train me up, and turn me into a
champ?! I'm not just talkin' G1 here—I mean all of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear she wants to win, and she's ready to make it happen. At the
time, I wasn't ready to face her determination head-on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Full of conviction, I search high and low for Tamamo Cross. After
ruling out the academy buildings, I head to the training course.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff! Huff, puff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There, I find Tamamo Cross, running as if her life depends on it.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff... Haaaa!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Crud... Not gettin' any better, am I?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You again!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm really sorry!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You went to the trouble of checkin' up on me, and I just threw it back
in your face... Seriously, I'm sorry.
choice_data_list: It's okay. I know you were upset.
It's okay. I know you were upset.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I was just frustrated, ya know? I ran like crap out there, and
now all the trainers think I'm some third-rate chump racer.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
People tend to take one look at me and assume I'm a weaklin' 'cause
of my size.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sayin' stuff like, "You'll get hurt." "Best in Japan? Not happenin',
pipsqueak." "That dream's a bit too big for you."

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I wanted to show 'em all what I'm made of. Show 'em I'm a winner too.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But, well... you saw what happened. I screwed it all up with that lousy
runnin' of mine.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The whole reason I'm at this school's 'cause I've got a dream. And I
needa be in the Twinkle Series to make it happen.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Just runnin' isn't gonna get me nowhere. I gotta win, and win a lot at
that! I needa run faster than wind—faster than light!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, sorry 'bout the other day. I should get back to practice. I
wanna win the next tryouts, ya see. So I gotta—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Where'd that come from? If you're tryin' to make me feel better,
don't. I'm fine.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
C-c'mon, you saw my last race, didn't ya?! My form's pathetic... I
couldn't even hit the board!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sure, I may talk a big game, but... I can't back it up. And I don't know
how to get better.
choice_data_list: But you want to win. More than anyone.
But you want to win. More than anyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No one feels the bitterness of defeat stronger than Tamamo Cross.
Her desire to leave it behind and race forward to win... matters far
more than her size.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That attitude is what will make her the top racer in all of Japan.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I don't get your confidence. You've only seen me race once, and then
we chatted for what, ten minutes tops?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You've got a screw loose, ya know that?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Anyway... Mind if we talk somewhere else? I'm all cooled down, and
there are a few too many eyes on us here, yeah? C'mon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she invites me to talk, her demeanor seems warmer somehow. I
nod, and the two of us head out in search of a place to chat.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: So... you really think I can win the tryouts?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: If you think I can do it, then let's make it happen.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. If I'm bein' honest with ya, I'm kinda stuck on how to practice
on my own. But I still wanna win, no matter what...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And to do that, I'm bettin' on you.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I wanna test you—see if there's any grit behind your words.
And at the same time, you can see if I truly got the makings of a
champ!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We'll just call it... a trial period of sorts! You can train me till the next
tryouts, and then—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
—we could—hey, lemme finish! Do ya make all your decisions dis
fast?! Whatever happened to hearin' a person out?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Simmer down! Ya want the whole school to hear?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But well, the spirit's appreciated. On that note, see ya tomorrow!
Can't wait to see whatcha do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, I enthusiastically enter my trial period as Tamamo Cross's
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day, we have our first training session together.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's see whatcha got for me, rookie. Whaddaya want me to do
first?
choice_data_list: This is the regimen we'll be doing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pull out the training plan I wrote out last night. It took me a while to
come up with the perfect plan to win the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Now this is a lotta exercises. And the detail... You really
made this last night?
choice_data_list: Yup! I was up all night making it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Dat explains da eye bags! I get that you're excited, but get some
shut-eye...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well, at least one thing's clear—you're takin' this as seriously as I am!
Okay, let's get this practice started! Don't you dare go easy on me!
